basic_details.job_title: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 23 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 has been announced by Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) to fill 23 Young Professional (YP) posts on a fixed-term basis at Rourkela Steel Plant (RSP), Management Training Institute (MTI) Ranchi, SAIL Safety Organization (SSO) Ranchi, and SAIL Digital Transformation Division (SDTD) Ranchi. Online applications open on 10 July 2026 and close on 31 July 2026. This article covers the complete SAIL YP notification, including vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, application fee, selection process, and the step-by-step online applicati

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 03-07-2026 Online Application Start Date: 10-07-2026 Online Application Last Date: 31-07-2026 Eligibility Cut-off Date: 03-07-2026

application_fee.details: Rs. 500/- for all categories (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3), payable online via Net Banking, Credit Card, or ATM-cum-Debit Card. Bank charges are borne separately by the candidate. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

qualification.details: All Indian Nationals who have completed 23 years of age and possess the requisite educational qualification and post-qualification work experience as on 03-07-2026 are eligible to apply, subject to fulfilment of other conditions mentioned in the official notification. | Vibration Analyst & Rotor Dynamics Expert (YP-3): B.E./B.Tech (Mechanical) + Vibration Analyst Cat-II Certification; 10 years in Condition Monitoring, 3 years in an Integrated Steel Plant Blast Furnace Process Expert (YP-2): B.E./B.Tech (Metallurgical); 6 years in Blast Furnace operations, Integrated Steel Plant Civil / Structural Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech (Civil); 3 years as Design Engineer in Structural/Civil works Engineer, Electrical & Automation: B.E./B.Tech (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics); 3 years in Electrical Maintenance & Automation, steel/rolling mills AI Engineer: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years in Python, AI/ML & Deep Learning Project Execution, Mechanical: B.E./B.Tech (Mechanical); 3 years in structural/utility erection, project execution Project Execution, Electrical: B.E./B.Tech (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics); 3 years in automation, instrumentation, HT/LT cable laying Data Analytics Officer, HCM & PMS: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years in ASP.NET / .NET Core development F&A, Sales & Main Accounts: CA/CMA/MBA (Finance); 3 years in Sales Accounting, Taxation, Accounts Consultant, HR - L&D Application Enablement: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years, proficiency in PHP & mobile app development Consultant, Digital Learning: Graduate + Instructional Design/EdTech certification; hands-on with Adobe Captivate/Articulate Storyline Consultant, Leadership & Capability Development: MBA/PGDM (HR); experience in leadership/management development programs 3D Animator / Visual Content Creator: BE/B.Tech/Graduate; 3 years in 3D Animation/Video making Data Scientist: B.E./B.Tech (M.E/M.Tech/Ph.D desirable); minimum 3 years Data Architect: B.E./B.Tech (M.E/M.Tech/Ph.D desirable); minimum 3 years | All experience must be gained after the qualifying degree in a Public Sector Undertaking, Government Organisation, Public Limited Company, JV of PSUs, or a private firm with a valid CIN. | YP-3 - Vibration Analyst and Rotor Dynamics Expert: 42 years YP-2 - Blast Furnace Process Expert: 38 years YP-1 (all roles): 35 years Minimum age for all posts: 23 years | YP-1: Rs. 70,000/- per month YP-2: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month YP-3: Rs. 1,40,000/- per month | An annual performance-linked increment of 4%, 7%, or 10% of the monthly fee applies based on Centralized Performance Committee (CPC) recommendation. Additional benefits include residential accommodation, medical facility, travel entitlements, and communication expense reimbursement.

selection_process: Screening of applications for eligibility. Selection through Computer Based Test (CBT) and Personal Interaction
depending on the post. CBT: 100 MCQs in 90 minutes - 50 on Technical/Professional knowledge
50 on Aptitude. Shortlisting for Personal Interaction in ratio of 1:3 based on CBT merit. Final merit list: CBT and Personal Interaction weightage of 80:20. If Personal Interaction only
how_to_apply: Read the advertisement carefully to confirm eligibility.
Go through the User Manual on the site.
Click "Fresh candidate to create Login (New Log in)" for first-time applicants.
Existing users log in with User ID and Password.
Complete One Time Registration (OTR) if new.
Fill the application form and upload required documents.
Pay the processing fee of Rs. 500/- online.
Note the generated Application Number after payment confirmation.
Download and print the Provisional Application Form.
important_instructions: Apply only against the grade for which you meet eligibility. No editing of application/payment details after submission. Candidature is provisional until Personal Interaction. Engagement is Fixed-Term for 3 years, extendable by up to 2 years; no right to regularization. Electronic gadgets not allowed at test centres. Keep registered Email/Mobile active for at least one year.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 has been announced by Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) to fill 23 Young Professional (YP) posts on a fixed-term basis at Rourkela Steel Plant (RSP), Management Training Institute (MTI) Ranchi, SAIL Safety Organization (SSO) Ranchi, and SAIL Digital Transformation Division (SDTD) Ranchi. Online applications open on 10 July 2026 and close on 31 July 2026. This article covers the complete SAIL YP notification, including vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, application fee, selection process, and the step-by-step online application procedure.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Overview Table

rows.details: RSP, MTI Ranchi, SSO Ranchi, SDTD Ranchi

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 03-07-2026 Online Application Start Date: 10-07-2026 Online Application Last Date: 31-07-2026 Eligibility Cut-off Date: 03-07-2026

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

rows.post_name: Data Analytics Officer, HCM & PMS Integration (YP-1)
Vibration Analyst and Rotor Dynamics Expert (YP-3)

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: All Indian Nationals who have completed 23 years of age and possess the requisite educational qualification and post-qualification work experience as on 03-07-2026 are eligible to apply, subject to fulfilment of other conditions mentioned in the official notification. Vibration Analyst & Rotor Dynamics Expert (YP-3): B.E./B.Tech (Mechanical) + Vibration Analyst Cat-II Certification; 10 years in Condition Monitoring, 3 years in an Integrated Steel Plant Blast Furnace Process Expert (YP-2): B.E./B.Tech (Metallurgical); 6 years in Blast Furnace operations, Integrated Steel Plant Civil / Structural Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech (Civil); 3 years as Design Engineer in Structural/Civil works Engineer, Electrical & Automation: B.E./B.Tech (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics); 3 years in Electrical Maintenance & Automation, steel/rolling mills AI Engineer: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years in Python, AI/ML & Deep Learning Project Execution, Mechanical: B.E./B.Tech (Mechanical); 3 years in structural/utility erection, project execution Project Execution, Electrical: B.E./B.Tech (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics); 3 years in automation, instrumentation, HT/LT cable laying Data Analytics Officer, HCM & PMS: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years in ASP.NET / .NET Core development F&A, Sales & Main Accounts: CA/CMA/MBA (Finance); 3 years in Sales Accounting, Taxation, Accounts Consultant, HR - L&D Application Enablement: B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA; 3 years, proficiency in PHP & mobile app development Consultant, Digital Learning: Graduate + Instructional Design/EdTech certification; hands-on with Adobe Captivate/Articulate Storyline Consultant, Leadership & Capability Development: MBA/PGDM (HR); experience in leadership/management development programs 3D Animator / Visual Content Creator: BE/B.Tech/Graduate; 3 years in 3D Animation/Video making Data Scientist: B.E./B.Tech (M.E/M.Tech/Ph.D desirable); minimum 3 years Data Architect: B.E./B.Tech (M.E/M.Tech/Ph.D desirable); minimum 3 years All experience must be gained after the qualifying degree in a Public Sector Undertaking, Government Organisation, Public Limited Company, JV of PSUs, or a private firm with a valid CIN. YP-3 - Vibration Analyst and Rotor Dynamics Expert: 42 years YP-2 - Blast Furnace Process Expert: 38 years YP-1 (all roles): 35 years Minimum age for all posts: 23 years YP-1: Rs. 70,000/- per month YP-2: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month YP-3: Rs. 1,40,000/- per month An annual performance-linked increment of 4%, 7%, or 10% of the monthly fee applies based on Centralized Performance Committee (CPC) recommendation. Additional benefits include residential accommodation, medical facility, travel entitlements, and communication expense reimbursement.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Rs. 500/- for all categories (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3), payable online via Net Banking, Credit Card, or ATM-cum-Debit Card. Bank charges are borne separately by the candidate. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications for eligibility. Selection through Computer Based Test (CBT) and Personal Interaction, or Personal Interaction only, depending on the post. CBT: 100 MCQs in 90 minutes - 50 on Technical/Professional knowledge, 50 on Aptitude. Shortlisting for Personal Interaction in ratio of 1:3 based on CBT merit. Final merit list: CBT and Personal Interaction weightage of 80:20. If Personal Interaction only, minimum qualifying mark is 50%.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Required Documents
content_sections.text: Proof of Date of Birth (Matriculation certificate or equivalent) Degree Certificate (B.E./B.Tech/CA/CMA/MBA as applicable) with mark sheets Experience certificate(s) from employer Photo ID Proof (Voter ID/Aadhaar/Passport/Driving License) NOC from present employer, if applicable Passport-size colour photograph (.jpg/.jpeg, up to 50 KB) Scanned signature (.jpg/.jpeg, up to 20 KB)

content_sections.heading: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Apply only against the grade for which you meet eligibility. No editing of application/payment details after submission. Candidature is provisional until Personal Interaction. Engagement is Fixed-Term for 3 years, extendable by up to 2 years; no right to regularization. Electronic gadgets not allowed at test centres. Keep registered Email/Mobile active for at least one year.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SAIL YP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 31-07-2026. Applications open from 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 22 Young Professional vacancies across Rourkela Steel Plant, MTI Ranchi, SSO Ranchi, and SDTD Ranchi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for SAIL Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: YP-1 receives Rs. 70,000/- per month, YP-2 receives Rs. 1,00,000/- per month, and YP-3 receives Rs. 1,40,000/- per month as consolidated retainership fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for SAIL YP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application processing fee is Rs. 500/- for all categories (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3), payable online.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SAIL Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 23 years. The upper age limit is 35 years for YP-1, 38 years for YP-2, and 42 years for YP-3, as on 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SAIL YP 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Personal Interaction, or Personal Interaction only for some posts, with final merit based on 80:20 weightage between CBT and interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is SAIL Young Professional a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is purely on a Fixed-Term Contract for Service basis for an initial period of 3 years, extendable by up to 2 more years, and does not confer regular employee status.
